query:
-- Final count of unlinked CommsCode numbers
SELECT COUNT(*) AS still_unlinked FROM phone_numbers
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode' AND (serviceExternalId IS NULL OR serviceExternalId = '');

-- Summary of all CommsCode numbers by customer with link status
SELECT customerName,
       COUNT(*) AS total,
       SUM(CASE WHEN serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND serviceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS linked,
       SUM(CASE WHEN serviceExternalId IS NULL OR serviceExternalId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unlinked
FROM phone_numbers
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode'
GROUP BY customerName
ORDER BY customerName;

-- Final count of unlinked CommsCode numbers
SELECT COUNT(*) AS still_unlinked FROM phone_numbers
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode' AND (serviceExternalId IS NULL OR serviceExternalId = '');

-- Summary of all CommsCode numbers by customer with link status
SELECT customerName,
       COUNT(*) AS total,
       SUM(CASE WHEN serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND serviceExternalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS linked,
       SUM(CASE WHEN serviceExternalId IS NULL OR serviceExternalId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unlinked
FROM phone_numbers
WHERE provider = 'CommsCode'
GROUP BY customerName
ORDER BY customerName;
